case.title: CHESAPEAKE & O R. CO. v. LEITCH

opinion.h4: CHESAPEAKE & O R. CO. v. LEITCH, (1927)
opinion.h2: CHESAPEAKE & OHIO RAILWAY COMPANY, petitioner, v. K. S. LEITCH. *
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. Douglas W. Brown, of Huntington, W. Va., for petitioner.
Mr. Jonn H. Holt, of Huntington, W. Va., for respondent.
The judgment of the Supreme Court of Appeals of the State of West Virginia in this case is affirmed by an equally divided Court.

f.p: Rehearing granted 48 S. Ct. 213, 72 L. Ed. -, and judgment reversed 276 U.S. 429, 48 S. Ct. 336, 72 L. Ed. -.[ Chesapeake & O R Co v. Leitch (1927) ]
